_note: L5 canon-as-data. Source of truth for the ExposureTypes catalog, previously duplicated between README.md and v2/Shared/Patterns.cs (ExposureTypes.All). Each entity mirrors a seeded ExposureTypeEntity row; the Findings.ExposureType foreign key points at name. Validated by _schema/exposure_type.schema.json.

entities.name: ApiKey
entities.description: Provider-issued API token (LLM, cloud, payments, communications, package registries, version control).

entities.name: ConnectionString
entities.description: Database / cache / message-broker URI containing inline username:password credentials.

entities.name: PrivateKey
entities.description: PEM-encoded private key block (RSA, DSA, EC, OpenSSH, PGP).

entities.name: PlainTextPassword
entities.description: Variable assignment to a string literal under a name like 'password', 'passwd', 'secret', or 'pwd'. High false-positive rate; opt-in scan only.
